value: Covenant breach 2027 -> restructuring / distressed refinancing; term-loan recovery risk rises but first-lien senior-secured on substantially-all-assets
Deteriorating
Only mitigant: first-lien position, all-domestic all-guarantor structure, 100% equity pledge, small $38.7M balance vs collateral
LOQTORZI stalls/declines as penpulimab launches and takes share; opex stays elevated; capital markets shut -> $15M covenant breached ~Q3 2027

Revenue erosion + elevated burn + closed capital markets exhaust liquidity by late-2027, tripping the $15M covenant well before the 2029 maturity. Outcome is a restructuring/distressed refinancing; lenders rely on collateral (license/BLA + pipeline) rather than repayment from cash.
MATERIAL FLAG: covenant breach precedes maturity by ~18 months; the $15M liquidity floor — not a performance covenant — is the tripwire (there is no leverage/coverage covenant).
